message:
feat(scanner): implement UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) integration

Adds REST API endpoints for running static analysis scans:
- POST /scanner/run - Run a scan with configurable options
- GET /scanner/findings - List findings with filtering
- GET /scanner/findings/:id - Get specific finding
- POST /scanner/findings/:id/dismiss - Dismiss a finding
- POST /scanner/findings/:id/create-bead - Create bead from finding
- GET /scanner/history - Get scan history
- GET /scanner/scans/:id - Get specific scan result
- GET /scanner/stats - Get scanner statistics
- GET /scanner/health - Check UBS availability

UBS service wraps the CLI and provides:
- Scan execution with JSON output parsing
- Finding storage and filtering
- Dismissal tracking (persists across scans)
- Scan history management

Implements bead flywheel_private-a42.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
